FEMM: review Probe FEMM through artifact://environment-spec/eng_wine_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for FEMM. Checklist FEMM pack links to the intended environment spec(s), FEMM adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, FEMM anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path, Manual acquisition gate remains explicit for FEMM. Watch anti-patterns Using FEMM for using femm as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside electrical, dynamic, and system workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_wine_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for FEMM without a typed contract tied to femm executable workflows for electrical, dynamic, and system workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_wine_docker. Runtime eng-wine/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-wine:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_wine_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_wine_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/4eba97e1-4659-5d48-9804-2b5dc3b28a6e. GUI state PLANNED_CONTAINER_GUI; default GUI session artifact://gui-session-spec/eng_wine_gui; control provider noVNC via OpenClaw browser. Runtime gate: website-delivered Windows installer has not yet been mirrored into the wine-backed canonical runtime.
MA87: review Probe MA87 through artifact://environment-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_docker, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for MA87. Checklist MA87 pack links to the intended environment spec(s), MA87 adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, MA87 anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path, Manual acquisition gate remains explicit for MA87. Watch anti-patterns Using MA87 for using ma87 as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside solver-backend workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_docker., Crossing the adapter boundary for MA87 without a typed contract tied to ma87 backend kernels reused by solver-backend workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_docker. Runtime eng-ipopt-onemkl/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-ipopt-onemkl:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/623621e6-1f88-5ae9-8717-96d842b23efe. GUI state PLANNED_CONTAINER_GUI; default GUI session artifact://gui-session-spec/eng_ipopt_onemkl_gui; control provider noVNC via OpenClaw browser. Runtime gate: licensed sparse direct solver backend not packaged in this sprint.
PYLEECAN: review Probe PYLEECAN through artifact://environment-spec/eng_system_uv, Confirm the current Phase 2 gate state for PYLEECAN. Checklist PYLEECAN pack links to the intended environment spec(s), PYLEECAN adapter and evidence bundle reference the same runtime verification report, PYLEECAN anti-patterns and failure signatures match the module class and runtime path, Manual acquisition gate remains explicit for PYLEECAN. Watch anti-patterns Using PYLEECAN for using pyleecan as a substitute for unrelated workflows outside electrical, dynamic, and system workflows., Skipping the linked health check and provenance capture for artifact://environment-spec/eng_system_uv., Crossing the adapter boundary for PYLEECAN without a typed contract tied to pyleecan executable workflows for electrical, dynamic, and system workflows.. Healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_system_uv. Runtime eng-system/uv_venv at .cache/knowledge-envs/eng-system; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_system_uv; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_system_uv; verification refs artifact://verification-report/3d7bd3e6-4784-50aa-9222-51ab356a54a9.
